meta.purpose: What is timely. Two kinds: `seasonal` windows are the fixed Zimbabwean agricultural calendar (Southern-Hemisphere, see guidelines/market.md) and never expire; `topics` are live researched items added by the Sunday research routine. A topic MUST carry a source and an expiry — an unsourced trend is a fabricated trend (Law 5).

topicShape.headline: one line, in voice
topicShape.note: why it matters to the audience right now

seasonal.name: Land prep & input sourcing
seasonal.note: Land preparation, input schemes open, seed and fertiliser decisions made before the rains. The cheapest yield gains of the year happen now.

seasonal.name: First planting rains
seasonal.note: Erratic onset is the biggest gamble in dryland farming. Planting-date decisions, false-start rains, staggered planting.

seasonal.name: Green season scouting & pest pressure
seasonal.note: Weeding, top-dressing, fall armyworm and disease pressure. Scouting workload peaks exactly when labour is scarcest.

seasonal.name: Mid-season dry spell risk
seasonal.note: January dry spells hit tasselling maize hardest. Moisture stress shows from space before it shows from the road.

seasonal.name: Tasselling & grain fill
seasonal.note: Yield is being decided week by week. Stress now is unrecoverable later — the season's sharpest window for acting on evidence.

seasonal.name: Tobacco marketing season
seasonal.note: TIMB floors and contract deliveries. Grading, pricing and side-marketing tension dominate farm cashflow talk.

seasonal.name: Harvest & post-harvest handling
seasonal.note: Harvest timing, drying, storage. Post-harvest loss is the most expensive silence in the calendar — the data bank is deep here.

seasonal.name: Grain marketing & GMB deliveries
seasonal.note: GMB deliveries, private buyers, storage-versus-sell decisions. Margin is made or lost after the crop is already in.

seasonal.name: Winter wheat under irrigation
seasonal.note: The irrigated winter season: wheat scheduling, water budgets, frost watch. A commercial-and-A2 audience window.

seasonal.name: Dry season review & next-season planning
seasonal.note: The season post-mortem window: what the field data said, what it cost to ignore, what changes before the next rains.

seasonal.name: Lean season realities
seasonal.note: Household grain runs low before the new harvest. Food-security stakes sharpen every economics message — handle with respect, never as spectacle.
